purpose: Paper-ready methods description for reducing Ethan OpenFOAM 3D CFD fields to 1D profiles and closure inputs.

native_zone_policy.faceZones: Use as authoritative monitor surfaces when available, especially mdot planes.
native_zone_policy.faceSets_and_cellSets: Use authored sets for monitor/PIV support where available; Salt 2 Jin mdot sets are faceSet objects and piv_slab is a cellSet.
native_zone_policy.cellZones: Use as geometry provenance or special-region summaries, not as the complete streamwise 1D coordinate basis.

key_methods: wall-face projection onto repaired major-span streamwise coordinates
raw cuttingPlane dumps plus single-leg Python masking
section-mean p_rgh, rho, U_bulk, dynamic head, total pressure
apparent Darcy friction from total-pressure loss gradients
enthalpy-flux-weighted bulk temperature for HTC and UA prime
QC gates for flow alignment, area support, positive flux, and minimum Delta T
